name: IRS back taxes / arrest threat
description: Caller or message claims you owe back taxes and will be arrested unless you pay immediately, usually via gift cards or wire transfer.
example: This is the IRS. You owe $4,287 in back taxes. A warrant has been issued for your arrest. To resolve this immediately, purchase $500 in Apple gift cards and call back with the codes.
red_flags: IRS never initiates contact by phone or text demanding immediate payment
IRS never accepts gift cards as payment
Threats of arrest are not how the IRS communicates
